overview.description: The Nuveen Municipal Income ETF (NUMI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund seeks to provide federal tax-exempt current income through an actively managed portfolio of US municipal bonds of any credit quality. The fund maintains an overall weighted average maturity of greater than 10 years. NUMI was launched on Jan 22, 2025 and is issued by Nuveen.
